new.title: New Attendance
new.description: Create a new attendance record for an employee. You can track their working hours and attendance status.

calendar.title: Attendance Calendar
calendar.description: View the attendance records of your employees in a calendar format. You can filter by month and employee.
calendar.no_records: No attendance records found for the selected month.

evaluations.date_helper: The selected date determines which evaluation is created or updated.

employees.title: Employees
employees.description: Manage your employees' KPIs and performance metrics. You can have up to {{maxFreeEmployees}} employees.

performance.title: Performance
performance.description: View and manage the performance metrics of your employees. You can track their KPIs and evaluation history.

remove.title: Remove Employee
remove.description: Are you sure you want to remove this employee? This action cannot be undone.

new.title: New Employee
new.description: Add a new employee to manage their KPIs and performance.

roles.title: Employee Roles
roles.description: Define roles for your employees to categorize their responsibilities.

details.title: Employee Details
details.description: View and edit the details of your employee, including their role, performance metrics, and evaluation history.

table.title: Employee List
table.description: Manage your employees by viewing their details, performance metrics, and evaluation history.

add.title: Add Template
add.description: Add template to the evaluation criteria to assess employee performance.

remove.title: Remove Evaluation Criteria
remove.description: Are you sure you want to remove this evaluation criteria? This action cannot be undone.

table.label: Label
table.title: Evaluation Criterias
table.subtitle: Manage the criteria used to evaluate employee performance. You can create multiple criteria for comprehensive evaluations.

description.title: Evaluation Criteria Description
description.description: Define the criteria for evaluating employee performance. You can create multiple criteria for comprehensive evaluations.

label.title: Evaluation Criteria Label
label.description: The label for the evaluation criteria, which will be used to assess employee performance.

weight.title: Weight
weight.description: The weight of the evaluation criteria, which determines its importance in the overall performance assessment.

templates.title: Evaluation Templates
templates.description: Select the templates that will be used for this evaluation criteria. You can link multiple templates to a single criteria.

new.title: New Criteria
new.description: Create a new evaluation criteria to assess employee performance.

edit.title: Edit Criteria
edit.description: Edit the selected evaluation criteria to update its details or template.

add.title: Add Criteria
add.description: Add criteria to the evaluation template to assess employee performance.

remove.title: Remove Evaluation Template
remove.description: Are you sure you want to remove this evaluation template? This action cannot be undone.

evaluation_templates.title: Evaluation Templates
evaluation_templates.subtitle: Manage the templates used for employee performance reviews. You can create multiple templates for different evaluation purposes.
evaluation_templates.name: Evaluation Template Name

select.description: Select an evaluation template to use for employee performance reviews.

new.title: New Template
new.description: Create a new evaluation template to use for employee performance reviews.

edit.title: Edit Template
edit.description: Edit the selected evaluation template to update its details or criteria.

evaluation_template_criterias.title: Evaluation Template Criterias
evaluation_template_criterias.subtitle: Manage the criteria included in your evaluation templates. You can add multiple criteria to each template.

employee_evaluations.title: Employee Evaluations
employee_evaluations.subtitle: View and manage evaluations for your employees. You can create new evaluations based on selected templates.

new.title: New Evaluation
new.description: Create a new evaluation for an employee using the selected template.

view.title: View Evaluation
view.description: View the details of the selected evaluation, including scores and comments.

new.title: New Role
new.description: Create a new role to assign specific responsibilities to your employees.

sign_in.title: Sign In
sign_in.description: Access your account to manage your employees KPI and performance.
sign_in.failed: Invalid email or password. Please try again.

sign_up.title: Sign Up
sign_up.description: Create a new account to start managing your employees KPI and performance.
sign_up.failed: An account with this email already exists. Please try a different email.

image.drop_click: Drag and drop an image or click to browse
image.only: Only *.jpeg and *.png images will be accepted

evaluate.title: Evaluate
evaluate.description: Evaluate an employee's performance based on the selected evaluation template.

number_of_paid_leave.label: Number of paid leave
number_of_paid_leave.description: The number of paid leave days an employee can take as a paid leave.

maximum_late_count.label: Maximum late count
maximum_late_count.description: The maximum number of late days an employee can take before being counted as a leave.

paid_leave_cycle.label: Paid Leave Cycle
paid_leave_cycle.description: The cycle of paid leave, which determines the renewal number of the leave.
